title: Isla's Peek-a-Boo Seasons
synopsis: Little Isla discovers the magic of seasons through peek-a-boo games in her backyard, watching the same apple tree transform through spring blossoms, summer fruit, autumn leaves, and winter snow.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is spring? Here it is! Isla sees pink flowers on the apple tree.

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes playing peek-a-boo behind her hands in a backyard with a blooming apple tree covered in delicate pink blossoms, rendered in soft spring pastels of pink, mint green, and cream
illustration.alt: Little girl with red hair peeking through fingers at spring apple blossoms

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is summer? Here it is! Isla finds red apples growing big and round.

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes hiding behind the apple tree trunk, now full of lush green leaves and bright red apples, illustrated in vibrant summer colors of emerald green, ruby red, and golden yellow sunshine
illustration.alt: Little girl with red hair hiding behind summer apple tree with red fruit

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is autumn? Here it is! Isla watches golden leaves dance down from the tree.

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes crouching behind a pile of fallen leaves as more golden, orange, and red leaves float down from the apple tree, painted in warm autumn tones of amber, rust, and deep orange
illustration.alt: Little girl with red hair playing in autumn leaves under apple tree

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is winter? Here it is! Isla sees snow covering the bare apple tree branches.

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes peeking out from behind a snowman next to the now bare apple tree dusted with white snow, depicted in cool winter colors of icy blue, silver, and pristine white
illustration.alt: Little girl with red hair behind snowman near winter apple tree with snow

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What grows on the apple tree in summer?
questions.explanation: In summer, the apple tree grows red apples that are big and round!

questions.question: What covers the tree in winter?
questions.explanation: In winter, white snow covers the bare apple tree branches.

questions.question: What color are the spring flowers?
questions.explanation: The spring flowers on the apple tree are beautiful pink blossoms!
